title: Registry Publication, SBOM, Provenance, Vulnerabilities, Policies, and CI Release · Docker Systems Brief: Docker Provenance Attestation
summary: A regulated service needs evidence for what an image contains, how it was built, which base it used, who approved it, and how rollback selects immutable content. Planned artifact: Add and verify the docker provenance attestation increment in signed and policy-gated image release packet. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Produce minimal or maximal SLSA provenance, locate materials and parameters, protect secret values, and verify the statement against source and builder policy.
Generate, attach, inspect, export, validate, and interpret SPDX SBOM attestations including build-stage and final-image coverage.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# docker-basics cumulative container delivery portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic manifest and evidence review only.
# They never connect to a Docker daemon, mount a socket, or execute learner commands.
workspace: docker
version-baseline:
  engine: 29.6.1
  compose: 5.3.1
  buildx: 0.35.0
  buildkit: 0.31.1
  dockerfile-frontend: 1.25
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-environment

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name client, daemon, builder, image, container, host-kernel, storage, network, registry, and supply-chain boundaries; predict state and authority; review the smallest deterministic manifest change; then verify a failure, repair, cleanup, and live-environment transfer limit.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A worked example candidate has a mutable tag, incomplete SBOM, minimal provenance, critical scanner finding, and unsigned exception. Bind source, base, builder, attestations, signature, policy, and promotion to a digest. Competency probe: Produce minimal or maximal SLSA provenance, locate materials and parameters, protect secret values, and verify the statement against source and builder policy. A defensible solution applies Docker Provenance Attestation, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to signed and policy-gated image release packet.

content.code:
# Evidence: docker-worked-docker-supply-chain-registry-release-4
  - competency: docker-worked-docker-supply-chain-registry-release-4
    artifact: release-policy.yaml
    decision: worked docker supply chain registry release 4
    scenario-variant: 3
    environment: air-gapped release worker with an internal registry mirror
    fault-injection: rebuild after the approved base digest is withdrawn
    retained-proof: accessible recovery runbook with rollback rehearsal timing
    case-key: worked4
    change: |
      source: reviewed-commit
      base: approved-digest
      output: immutable-registry-digest
      sbom: spdx-attestation
      provenance: max
      vulnerability-policy: severity-and-exploitability
      signature: identity-bound
    verify: docker buildx imagetools inspect candidate@sha256:release && docker scout cves candidate@sha256:release
    failure: Reject tag-only promotion, SBOM-as-vulnerability-scan, unsigned attestations, ignored base drift, or severity alone without reachability and exception ownership.
    repair: Bind source, builder, inputs, output digest, SBOM, provenance, signature, scan policy, exception expiry, and promotion evidence.
content.caption: Runnable Docker artifact and transfer-evidence contract example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: Provenance automatically proves source review, reproducibility, and builder trust. This fails the Docker Provenance Attestation contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Produce minimal or maximal SLSA provenance, locate materials and parameters, protect secret values, and verify the statement against source and builder policy.
